title: NIT Durgapur MBA Admission 2026–2028 Overview

detail.title: NIT Durgapur MBA Admission 2026–2028 Overview
detail.short_info: NIT Durgapur MBA Admission 2026–28 is open. Apply online before 30 April 2026 for the MBA program at the National Institute of Technology Durgapur (NIT Durgapur). Check eligibility, fees, selection process, and important dates.

content.text: NIT Durgapur MBA Admission 2026–2028 is now open for the 2-year full-time MBA program offered by the Department of Management Studies (DoMS) at National Institute of Technology Durgapur. Interested candidates can submit their online applications until 30 April 2026 (up to 5:00 PM).

Admission is granted based on valid scores from CAT 2025, CMAT 2026, XAT 2026, MAT (December 2025), or MAT (February 2026), followed by the Writing Ability Test (WAT), Group Discussion (GD), and Personal Interview (PI).
The program is designed to provide quality management education with a blend of theory and practical exposure.
The MBA at NIT Durgapur is a prestigious postgraduate program aimed at developing future business leaders.

rows: National Institute of Technology Durgapur (NIT Durgapur)

sections.heading: NIT Durgapur MBA Admission 2026 Important Dates

content.text: Key timeline as per the official brochure:

sections.heading: NIT Durgapur MBA Admission 2026 Seat Matrix

content.text: Total intake for the 2026–2028 batch is 44 seats.

sections.heading: NIT Durgapur MBA Admission 2026 Eligibility Criteria

content.text: Candidates must meet the following requirements:
A valid score in one of:

items: OPEN / OBC / EWS: 55% or 6.0 CGPA (10-point scale)

content.text: Final-year students (graduating in 2026) can apply but must submit proof of meeting the criteria at admission time.
Non-refundable fee payable via NEFT/Net Banking to the specified Canara Bank account:
Include transaction details in the application form.

sections.heading: How to Apply for NIT Durgapur MBA Admission 2026–2028

items: Pay the application fee via NEFT/Net Banking to the designated account and note the UTR/Transaction ID.
Visit the official PG admission portal: https://nitdgp.ac.in/pg/
Access the MBA admission section and register using a valid email and mobile number.
Fill the online application form accurately.
Upload required scanned documents (in the prescribed format).
Submit the form, download the PDF, and sign it.
Email the signed PDF along with attachments to [email protected] as instructed.

content.text: Apply Online: Click here to apply via the official portal.

sections.heading: NIT Durgapur MBA Admission 2026 Required Documents

content.text: Prepare scanned copies of:

items: Other documents as specified in the brochure.

sections.heading: NIT Durgapur MBA Admission 2026 Selection Process

content.text: Shortlisting is based on entrance scores. Final merit uses these weightages:
NIT Durgapur is a residential institute, and MBA students are typically allotted hostel accommodation on campus (subject to availability and rules). No family accommodation is provided.
The exact fee structure for the 2026–2028 batch will be notified on the official website closer to admission. Refer to the institute portal for the latest PG/MBA fee details.
